source_text: Implementations MUST set the padding octets to all zeros before encrypting.
rule_statement: Padding octets in TLSInnerPlaintext MUST be all zeros before encryption.
checkability_rationale: Can verify padding bytes are zero after decryption.

source_text: Implementations MUST NOT send Handshake and Alert records that have a zero-length TLSInnerPlaintext.content; if such a message is received, the receiving implementation MUST terminate the connection with an "unexpected_message" alert.
rule_statement: Handshake and Alert records MUST NOT have zero-length TLSInnerPlaintext.content; receivers MUST terminate with unexpected_message.
applies_when: Sending or receiving encrypted Handshake or Alert records
expected_value: length > 0 for Handshake and Alert types
checkability_rationale: Can verify correct alert when receiving zero-length handshake/alert content.
extraction_confidence_rationale: Explicit MUST NOT with specified alert.

source_text: Implementations MUST limit their scanning to the cleartext returned from the AEAD decryption.
rule_statement: Content type scanning MUST be limited to the cleartext returned from AEAD decryption.
applies_when: Scanning for content type after decryption
expected_value: scan only within AEAD-decrypted cleartext bounds
checkability_rationale: Internal implementation detail; hard to observe externally.

source_text: If a receiving implementation does not find a non-zero octet in the cleartext, it MUST terminate the connection with an "unexpected_message" alert.
rule_statement: If no non-zero octet is found in decrypted cleartext (no content type), MUST terminate with unexpected_message.
applies_when: After AEAD decryption yields all-zero cleartext
checkability_rationale: Can send crafted all-zero plaintext and verify alert response.

source_text: The presence of padding does not change the overall record size limitations: the full encoded TLSInnerPlaintext MUST NOT exceed 2^14 + 1 octets.
rule_statement: Full encoded TLSInnerPlaintext (content + type + padding) MUST NOT exceed 2^14 + 1 octets.
checkability_rationale: Can verify decrypted record does not exceed size limit.
